channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: 2026 Global Internship Program
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of 2026 Global Internship Program. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Feb 28, 2026.

item.title: Manager, Board Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Manager, Board Operations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Mar 26, 2026.

item.title: Counsel - Private Sector Investment & Treasury Operations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Counsel - Private Sector Investment & Treasury Operations. Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: Senior Economist - Climate Policy, Regulatory and Institutional Reforms (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Economist - Climate Policy, Regulatory and Institutional Reforms (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: Senior Gender Specialist (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Gender Specialist (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: Environment Associate (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Environment Associate (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: (Senior) Environmental and Social Development Specialist - CSO Engagement (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of (Senior) Environmental and Social Development Specialist - CSO Engagement (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: (Senior) Environmental/ Social Development Specialist - Occupational Health and Safety(OHS)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of (Senior) Environmental/ Social Development Specialist - Occupational Health and Safety(OHS). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: (Senior) Social Development Specialist - Labor (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of (Senior) Social Development Specialist - Labor (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.

item.title: Social Development Associate (for pooling only)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Social Development Associate (for pooling only). Location: Beijing, China.
